features.evidence: So far, the storage capacity and battery life have been awesome. So I either have to pay someone to install my (hopefully) missing hard drive and RAM, or I have to buy screwdrivers to open the laptop and do it myself.
Good value for the price though. A similar setup would have cost me way more.
The screen quality is better than my last ACER. I keep trying to copy, paste, and save on reflex while working on paperwork and it basically jumpscares me with a pop-up screen.
So far, the storage capacity and battery life have been awesome.

I got an error message related to the GPU when I checked the Nvidia app it said there was no driver installed, it took two attempts for the driver to download when I rebooted the computer it would only light up the keyboard no sounds no fans no start up.

I got an error message related to the GPU when I checked the Nvidia app it said there was no driver installed, it took two attempts for the driver to download when I rebooted the computer it would only light up the keyboard no sounds no fans no start up.
I tried several attempts at hard reboots and getting into the bios
There was an electronic burning smell, and then the fan wouldn’t shut off and the computer overheated.
